name: Script Request
about: Request a new script to be added

labels: script request

---

## Script Name

Suggested name for the script (e.g., `backup-automation`)

## Description

What should this script do? Be as specific as possible.

## Category

- [ ] bash/system
- [ ] bash/devtools
- [ ] bash/utilities
- [ ] python/automation
- [ ] python/data-processing
- [ ] python/utilities
- [ ] powershell/windows
- [ ] powershell/system
- [ ] powershell/utilities
- [ ] nodejs
- [ ] other (please specify)

## Language Preference

- [ ] Bash
- [ ] Python
- [ ] PowerShell
- [ ] Node.js
- [ ] No preference / Any

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this script. What problem does it solve?

## Desired Features

List the features you'd like the script to have:

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Platform

Which platform(s) should this work on?

- [ ] Linux
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Cross-platform

## Priority

How important is this script to you?

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would be helpful
- [ ] Really need this
- [ ] Critical

## Similar Scripts

Are there existing scripts or tools that do something similar? If so, please provide links.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or examples about the requested script.

---

**Note: For general feature requests (not specific scripts), please use the [Feature Request](feature_request.md) template.**
